reviews.text: Melissa was great at communicating and provided updates while my bears got crafted! They’re beautifully made and super cute!! They’ll be a great addition to my baby shower gift baskets 🥰
Beautiful item, well crafted. The shipping is very slow!
The flamingo is beautiful! Just as described. Will make a wonderful gift.

I placed a special order for this item.  Specific color and size.  He looks GREAT!!  Can't wait to give him to the birthday girl.  She's going to LOVE him!  Thank you for your hard work.  Love love love.
I love the result of this custom gift!!!!  The customer service was outstanding and the quality and workmanship is well above my expectations. Thank you!!!!!!!

Melissa was very helpful and accommodating when I reached out about our order, as we needed 3 tie backs -  I was able to order 1 of each. They are wonderfully made, and very cute. They will work beautifully in our son’s safari themed nursery.
I would highly recommend.
